name: two_decimal_percentage_not_rejected
description: Regression fixture for a real production false-positive (2026-07-19 ntfy alert): the LLM output percentages at 2 decimal places (e.g. '20.19%'), matching the precision of the raw facts values, but _fmt_pct only generated 0dp/1dp allowed strings so faithful figures were rejected as 'unverified'. validate_entities_and_numbers must accept 2dp-rounded figures too.

faithful_output.headline: Tencent leads provider share at 20.19%
faithful_output.summary: Tencent's token share reached 20.19%, up 11.17% over the last 30 days.
highlights: Tencent now holds 20.19% of total token share
